# Reference: Marketing Campaign Analytics

This is unrelated cross-domain reference material used only as a retrieval distractor.

The marketing analytics console gives campaign managers a dashboard of conversion rate,
cost per acquisition, and channel attribution for the current quarter. The objective is to
let growth leads decide where to spend the next budget cycle. The main users are campaign
managers and the demand-generation team. The success metric is to raise qualified-lead
conversion by a defined target. In scope: paid-channel performance reporting. Out of scope:
creative asset production and brand guidelines. Acceptance is judged by whether managers
trust the attribution numbers shown on each screen.
